languages.text: "Соберись, капитан. Что говорит об этом Устав? Стойко выноси тяготы и четко выполняй распоряжения командующего".
"Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Handbook dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."
languages.original_text: "Соберись, капитан. Что говорит об этом Устав? Стойко выноси тяготы и четко выполняй распоряжения командующего".

traits.locale_text: "Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Code dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders with precision."
"Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Code dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."
{n}The look Batoshski gives Dunawski is one of grim scorn.{/n}
"Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Code dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders with precision."
"Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Code dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーがドゥナウスキーに向ける視線は、険しい軽蔑そのものだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The look Batoshski gives Dunawski is one of grim scorn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}バトシュスキーがドゥナウスキーに向ける視線は、険しい軽蔑そのものだ。{/n}

languages.text: « Reprenez-vous, capitaine. Que nous dicte le Manuel ? Qu'il faut rester fort face à l'adversité et obéir aux ordres de notre commandant à la lettre. »
languages.original_text: "Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Handbook dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."

traits.locale_text: « Reprenez-vous, capitaine. Que nous dicte le Manuel ? Qu'il faut rester fort face à l'adversité et obéir aux ordres de notre commandant à la lettre. »

languages.text: "Kendine gel Yüzbaşı. El Kitabı neyi emrediyor? Zorluklara katlan ve komutanın emirlerini harfiyen yerine getir."
languages.original_text: "Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Handbook dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."

traits.locale_text: "Kendine gel Yüzbaşı. El Kitabı neyi emrediyor? Zorluklara katlan ve komutanın emirlerini harfiyen yerine getir."

languages.text: "Reißt Euch zusammen, Captain. Was besagt das Handbuch? Ertragt alle Strapazen und führt die Befehle des Commanders exakt aus."
languages.original_text: "Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Handbook dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."

traits.locale_text: "Reißt Euch zusammen, Captain. Was besagt das Handbuch? Ertragt alle Strapazen und führt die Befehle des Commanders exakt aus."

languages.text: «Compóngase, capitana. ¿Qué dice el manual? Supere las penurias y ejecute las órdenes de su comandante al pie de la letra».
languages.original_text: "Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Handbook dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."

traits.locale_text: «Compóngase, capitana. ¿Qué dice el manual? Supere las penurias y ejecute las órdenes de su comandante al pie de la letra».

languages.text: “打起精神来，上尉。《手册》上怎么说的？忍受苦难，一丝不苟地执行指挥官的命令。”
languages.original_text: "Pull yourself together, Captain. What does the Handbook dictate? Endure hardships and execute the commander's orders exactly."

traits.locale_text: “打起精神来，上尉。《手册》上怎么说的？忍受苦难，一丝不苟地执行指挥官的命令。”
